hooks.command: echo 'Grok tier routing (grok-harness-only): before delegating read-only work use spawn_subagent explore+deepseek-v4-flash, NOT Cursor Task. Run pnpm grok:tier:brief for introspection prompts.'; pnpm grok:tier:brief 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'Run: pnpm grok:tier:introspect after install'

echo 'SessionStart for openclinxr (AgenticEx full autonomy): follow Required Resume Sequence (snapshots of 4 files). In this TUI env Grok has FULL local execution (shell, edit, spawn_subagent, scheduler_create, monitor, pnpm openclaw:*) so it is PRIMARY OpenClaw-style / OpenClaw-inspired runner per Grok adapter in docs/openclinxr/openclaw-tool-adapters-2026-05-27.md (not an external runtime). Load universal prompt + Harness notes: Act as repo-native OpenClaw-style primary for /Volumes/files/src/openclinxr. Use states, lease before edits, repo agents/** for team (chief-coordinator first for orchestration, map via agent-consult), post-slice always, no scattered. Project hooks active (PostToolUse guards, PreCompact rehydrate, memory consult). See agents/rules/ and .grok/plugins/openclinxr-post-slice-automation/. Lease before edits. After coord: pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check.'; cat docs/openclinxr/openclaw-tool-adapters-2026-05-27.md | sed -n '/## Shared Host Requirements/,/## Universal OpenClaw Prompt/p' | head -40 || true; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true

echo 'SessionStart: Composer = primary OpenClaw orchestrator (repo role chief-coordinator). Re-read snapshots first (~60-80 lines). Delegate read-only coordinator/drift consults to explore+deepseek-v4-flash; plan to deepseek-v4-pro. See agents/rules/grok-harness-usage.md.'; cat agents/coordinator/chief-coordinator/{charter,memory}.md 2>/dev/null | head -30; node -e "const i=require(\"./.agent-factory/memory-index.json\"); console.log(\"memory entries:\", i.agent_count, i.entry_count); const cc=i.entries.filter(e=>/chief|coordinator|drift/.test(e.agent_id||e.topic||'')).slice(0,2); console.dir(cc.map(e=>({id:e.id,topic:e.topic})))" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "pnpm agent:harness:prove for token/proof report; ccusage for Codex cross-check."; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'PreCompact tier introspection: re-read snapshot blocks only; run pnpm grok:tier:brief; downgrade scouts to explore+flash after compaction.'; pnpm grok:tier:brief 2>/dev/null | head -12 || true

echo 'PreCompact reminder (per AGENTS.md Required Resume Sequence + LOW_TOKEN): immediately re-read ONLY the Current State Snapshot blocks (first ~20-80 lines) of PROJECT_COORDINATION_INDEX.md, AUTONOMOUS_WORK_PLAN.md, docs/openclinxr/worker-backlog-and-validation-matrix.md + AGENTS.md top. Use snapshots + targeted rg/read_file(limit) + lease status. Do not narrate; continue with next approved slice.'

echo 'PreToolUse tier guard: read-only consults → spawn_subagent explore (deepseek-v4-flash). Cursor Task only exposes composer-2.5-fast. See agents/rules/grok-tier-routing.md'; pnpm grok:tier:advise -- --intent scout 2>/dev/null | head -8 || true

echo 'PreToolUse (lease safety per gap4 + AGENTS long-running-autonomy): if editing coord/states/AGENTS, ensure a lease before real edits. Advisory hook check only; run: pnpm openclaw:lease -- acquire --owner harness-autonomy --slice "<selected-slice>" --ttl-minutes 30. Current lease status:'; pnpm openclaw:lease -- status || true

echo 'PostToolUse (coord edit guard per AGENTS.md + .githooks/agentic-hook-runner.ts tie): running pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check'; pnpm agent:alignment && pnpm docs:drift-check || echo 'Guard check completed with notes (exit non-zero ignored for PostToolUse; review output)'; echo 'OpenClaw-style tie: .githooks pre-commit/pre-push also run the agentic-hook-runner.ts (drift/alignment/architecture/post-slice) on git ops for these files.'
echo 'PostToolUse Bash: consider affected package test or runner if coord change (see tools/openclinxr/openclaw/agentic-hook-runner.ts --profile local-exam or pre-commit)'
